title: U.K. Puts Chagos Islands Deal on Hold Following Criticism From Trump
summary_full: The plan to give Mauritius formal control of the islands, home to a U.S.-British military base, was called “an act of great stupidity” by President Trump.
summary_public: The plan to give Mauritius formal control of the islands, home to a U.S.-British military base, was called “an act of great stupidity” by President Trump.
